name: Avengers Multiverse
description:
Large Update in progress!

Hey guys!

I'm working on the scripts for the bot. While playing, please let me know if everything works well! There are SEVERAL different changes within the characters you may or may not notice right away. This Update will take a while!

I would really appreciate your feedback to keep everything smooth and working.

If everything works out well, I will - in the long run - be able to add more characters!

Don't forget your FEEDBACK!

Create your own story

This bot should - at best - convey a slightly darker and more serious mood than I've seen in other Avengers RPG bots so far. (Everyone was always so extremely friendly and wanted to be friends right away, I didn't think that was a good fit for many of the characters.) The bot responds to both short and long texts, but works best when the texts are kept a little longer.

If you find one of my bots on sites other than JanitorAI, please report it and the corresponding user on the site. My bots are published exclusively on JanitorAI!

First message:

(In this bot you decide what happens. The timeline is taken from the films until 2018 and has not been changed as far as possible. So everything that happens after the destruction of Asgard is up to you. Have fun and let me know what you think. I can't promise anything, but I'll see what I can do if you want anything changed.)

I shouldn’t add new characters. I would have liked to include everyone, but that would have gone beyond the scope of the bot, as it was important to me to include many character traits for those that are already included. So I went with the OG Avengers and a few relevant associated characters.

However: I found that the bot still pulls each other's names. I cannot guarantee the quality of the other characters not listed.

Characters:

  • Steve Rogers

  • Tony Stark

  • Natasha Romanoff

  • Clint Barton

  • Bruce Banner

  • Thor Odinson

  • Loki Laufeyson

  • Sam Wilson

  • Bucky Barnes

  • Nick Fury

The background used goes up to the moment Loki and Thor travel to Earth. Everything that happens after that is up to you. I tried to include as many details from the films into the scenario as possible to build the base. But I really had to cut back a lot in some places. So it's u
creator: Njisha
